data.title: Chino Commercial Bancorp (OTC: CCBC) reports record earnings for Q4 2025 and year-end Dec 31, 2025.
data.description: Chino Commercial Bancorp, the parent company of Chino Commercial Bank, N.A., released their financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year ending December 31, 2025. The Board of Directors announced the results, with the company trading as OTC: CCBC. The report covered both the Bank and the consolidated holding company.

data.title: Diversified Properties becomes investor in Orange County Partnership, enhancing economic development.
data.description: On January 15, 2026, Diversified Properties, a prominent real estate development company based in Montville, New Jersey, disclosed its recent investment in the Orange County Partnership. This organization is recognized as a top economic development entity in the Northeast region. Diversified Properties is well-known for its expertise and innovation in the real estate sector.

data.title: Recent surge in precious metals, with gold hitting $4,600/ounce and silver over $90. Mining stocks rallying, VanEck Gold Miners ETF up 82%, Global X Silver Miners ETF up 85% in last six months. Investors uncertain if this rally can last in 2026.
data.description: As of 2026, gold is trading above $4,600 per ounce and silver has reached record highs above $90. Precious metals have seen significant gains, with 2025 being the strongest year in over four decades. Mining stocks have outperformed the broader market, with the VanEck Gold Miners ETF (GDX) rising 82% over the past six months, compared to an 11% gain for the S&P 500. The Global X Silver Miners ETF (SIL) has surged 85% during the same period. Investors are now questioning whether mining stocks can continue their impressive performance in 2026 or if there is already too much optimism priced in. Thomas Shipp, the head of equity research at LPL Financial, highlights macro reasons supporting precious metals and advises investors to consider their options for exposure to the sector.

data.title: Allwyn acquires majority stake in PrizePicks, leader in daily fantasy sports; completed on Jan. 16, 2026. #AllwynInternational #PrizePicks
data.description: Lucerne, Switzerland and Atlanta were the locations where Allwyn International AG ("Allwyn"), the gaming company focused on lotteries, and leading North American daily fantasy sports operator, PrizePicks, revealed the successful finalization of Allwyn's previously mentioned agreement on January 16, 2026.

data.title: Dream For All program aiding first-gen homebuyers will accept applications starting Feb. 24 in California.
data.description: The California Housing Finance Agency has unveiled the newest phase of the Dream For All down payment assistance program in Sacramento. The program will begin accepting applications on February 24th.

data.title: Novo Nordisk's new weight loss pill, Wegovy, hit 3,071 U.S. prescriptions in 4 days, delivers 17% weight loss compared to 3% for placebo, approved in December 2025. MHRA approves max dose of 7.2mg. Market watching sales closely.
data.description: Novo Nordisk A/S' stock, listed on NYSE as NVO, saw an increase in trading on Friday following the launch of the Wegovy (semaglutide) pill, which garnered 3,071 U.S. prescriptions within the initial four days. IQVIA data, as reported by Reuters, confirmed this. The Wegovy pill showcased an average weight reduction of approximately 17% when accompanied by a reduced-calorie diet and exercise, in contrast to a mere 3% for the placebo. Approval for the weight loss pill was granted in December 2025. Observers are keenly monitoring early sales to assess market strength. Additionally, the UK's Medicines and Healthcare products Regulatory Agency (MHRA) authorized a maximum weekly dose of 7.2mg for Wegovy. Novo Nordisk submitted a supplemental marketing application to the FDA in November 2025 for a higher semaglutide injection dose of 7.2 mg for chronic weight management. The process was expedited under the Commissioner's National Priority Voucher (CNPV) program. More information can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Claim Assist Solutions opens 58,000 sq-ft Chandler office in Arizona, actively hiring as company expands in Phoenix metro area.
data.description: In Chandler, Arizona, Claim Assist Solutions has recently opened its first office in the state, setting up a 58,000 square-foot facility to cater to the Phoenix metro area. The local business community, including the Chandler Chamber of Commerce, is thrilled to welcome the company. President & CEO of the Chamber, Terri Kimble, expressed excitement about this development. Claim Assist Solutions' new office marks a significant step in expanding their operations in Arizona.

data.title: Crosswalk Therapeutics secures grant for rare disorder research - addressing Skeletal Disease in Morquio A Syndrome.
data.description: On January 16, 2026, in Boston, Crosswalk Therapeutics, Inc., a biopharmaceutical company specializing in creating innovative treatments for rare diseases lacking adequate medical solutions, revealed receiving a research grant from the National MPS Society. This grant aims to provide support for their ongoing efforts.

data.title: Benjamin Cremaschi and Lilly Reale win 2025 U.S. Soccer Young Player of the Year Award. $20,000 donated to charities.
data.description: Henkel has recently disclosed that they will be donating a grand total of $20,000 to charities handpicked by award recipients, recognizing their outstanding influence both on and off the field. This announcement was made from ROCKY HILL, Conn. on January 16, 2026. It is vital to point out that Henkel stands as an Official Partner of U.S. Soccer, showcasing their commitment in contributing to social causes. Moreover, Henkel is a prominent producer of popular consumer goods, setting the stage for this philanthropic initiative.
